segments.text: Good morning, First, I’d like to say a big “thank you” to everyone who worked overtime over the weekend to complete this year’s stock count. You guys finished in record time! That being said, there is still a lot to do before the end of this month.

We finally received the men’s winter coats from our supplier yesterday, and we need to get them out on the floor before the early holiday sale starts on December 1. Additionally, we will be erecting two temporary stands near the entrance to display last year’s leftover stock for sale. I know you are all doing your best, and I won’t forget it when I calculate this year’s bonuses.
Keep it up! Thanks again, C. Smith General Manager, C&M Fashion
